creator: des@ewox.org
text:
Ports that depend on Xaw3d won't build because the Xaw3d's library version
number is now 7 instead of 6. What's more, the PLIST for the Xaw3d port
incorrectly lists lib/libXaw3d.so.6.1 instead of lib/libXaw3d.so.7.

Severity/Priority set to critical/high due to impending release.

Fix: 

Change the relevant port Makefiles to require Xaw3d.7 instead of Xaw3d.6.
How-To-Repeat: 
Build Xaw3d:

root@des /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/Xaw3d# make
===>  Extracting for Xaw3d-1.5
